oil-painting.name: oil painting
oil-painting.prompt: Transform this photo into an artistic oil style painting. Brush strokes and pastel colors.

promoMessage: Join us at Twilio SIGNAL on May 6-7 in SF, register here: https://twil.io/SIGNAL26

messages.welcome: Send us a selfie and we'll turn it into art! You'll get to pick your style after.
messages.remainingCount: By the way, you have {remaining} {unit}(s) remaining.
messages.quotaExceeded: You've already used your {maxPrints} free {units} for {eventName}. Thanks for stopping by!
messages.multiplePhotos: One at a time! Send a single selfie and we'll work our magic.
messages.pickupPrint: It may take a minute or two -- we'll text you when it's ready for pickup at the Twilio booth.
messages.pickupDigital: It may take a minute or two -- we'll text it to you as soon as it's done.
messages.twilioBlurb: Fun fact: this experience is powered by Twilio! Your photo is received via text, transformed by AI, and delivered back to you -- all through Twilio's APIs.
messages.deliveryPrint: Your {styleName} portrait has been sent to the printer! Head to the Twilio booth to pick it up.
messages.lastPortrait: That was your last one -- thanks for visiting!
messages.styleMenuIntro: Great selfie! Pick your art style:
messages.styleMenuFooter: Reply with a number or style name.
messages.styleMenuRetry: That one isn't on the menu! Reply with a number or style name:
messages.backgroundMenuFooter: Reply with a number or name.
messages.backgroundMenuRetry: That didn't match a background. Try again:
messages.moderationFail: That photo didn't work -- try sending a different selfie. Don't worry, it didn't use up a print!
messages.noFace: We need to see your face for the portrait! Send a selfie with your face visible. Don't worry, that one didn't count.
messages.leadIntroBefore: Before we create your portrait, we just need a few quick details -- it'll only take a minute!
messages.leadIntroAfter: While your portrait is being prepared, we just have a few quick questions -- it'll only take a minute!
messages.leadCompleteWithCta: Thanks, {firstName}! Now send us a selfie and we'll turn it into art.
messages.npsPrompt: Thanks for visiting! How would you rate your portrait experience? Reply with a number 1-5 (5 = loved it)
messages.npsThanks: Thanks for the feedback! We appreciate it.
